NEHGS REGISTER 1987 p 328
In his will dated 10 September 1587 (NRO, ANW 1587, fo. 192) Thomas Moulton of Ormsbie St Margaret, yeoman, reqested burial in the churchyard there. He left to his son Robert …

zh.St Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby St Marga: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Moulton於大約1513年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親Robert Moulton40歲，母親Margaret Watts37歲。他於1555年與Joanna Greene結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特被列為yeoman。他去世於從1587年9月10日到1587年10月13日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.St Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby St Marga: 英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh-hans.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Moulton于大约1513年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特时，他的父亲Robert Moulton40岁，母亲Margaret Watts37岁。他于1555年与Joanna Greene结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特被列为yeoman。他去世于从1587年9月10日到1587年10月13日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

en.St Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby St Marga: Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Moulton was born about 1513, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Moulton, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Watts, was 37. He married Joanna Greene in 1555. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as yeoman in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England. He died from 10 September 1587 to 13 October 1587, in his hometown, and was buried in Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Moulton est né environ 1513, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Moulton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Watts, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Greene en 1555. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est yeoman à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé du 10 septembre 1587 au 13 octobre 1587, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Moulton um 1513 in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Moulton 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Watts 37. Er hat 1555 Joanna Greene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als yeoman in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb von 10. September 1587 bis 13. Oktober 1587 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joanna Greene nel 1555. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come yeoman nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England. Morì da 10 settembre 1587 a 13 ottobre 1587, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Moultonが約1513年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで生まれた時，父Robert Moultonは40歳，母Margaret Wattsは37歳であった。1555年にJoanna Greeneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットでの職業はyeomanと記録されている。彼はから1587年9月10日まで1587年10月13日に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー スト マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.St Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby St Marga: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Moulton(이)가 대략 1513년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Moulton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Watts(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1555년 Joanna Greene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 yeoman이었다. 그는 1587년 9월 10일부터 1587년 10월 13일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Moulton nasceu aproximadamente 1513, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Moulton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Watts, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Greene em 1555. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como yeoman em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu de 10 de setembro de 1587 a 13 de outubro de 1587, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby St Marga: ормесби ст маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Moulton родился около 1513 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Moulton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Watts, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Greene в 1555 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии yeoman в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия. Он умер с 10 сентября 1587 по 13 октября 1587 в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ормесби ст маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
